'''Ch'hodos''' was a rocky [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] a [[Ch'hodos's red sun|red sun]] within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Worlds]] region. Ch'hodos was considered a lesser world of the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] and served as the central base of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Shar Dakhan]] by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]].

During the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow's]] preparations to [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|attack]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Ch'hodos became a rally ground for his [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], with Sadow himself and his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], [[Gav Daragon]], overlooking the embarking of the [[Troop/Legends|troops]]. More than a [[Millennium/Legends|millennium]] later, the [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] from Ch'hodos's [[Star/Legends|sun]] had increased, leading to [[Mutant|mutations]] in the local desert wildlife.

==Description==
Ch'hodos was a [[Color/Legends|red]], rocky [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE" /> with [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] on its surface.<ref name="Under a Red Star" /> It [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] a [[Ch'hodos's red sun|red sun]]<ref name="Under a Red Star" /> in the [[Ch'hodos system/Legends|Ch'hodos system]], a part of the [[Esstran sector/Legends|Esstran sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The area of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] containing the planet, known as the [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Worlds]],<ref name="EAOC" /> was surrounded by the [[Stygian Caldera]] [[Nebula/Legends|nebulosity]].<ref name="TEA" />

Ch'hodos lay along the [[Nache Bhelfia]]—a looping [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that connected the five sacred [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] worlds of [[Ziost/Legends|Ziost]], [[Khar Delba]], [[Rhelg/Legends|Rhelg]], [[Krayiss II]], and [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]—while the [[Zorfe Trete]] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route linked Ch'hodos to the world of [[Ashas Ree/Legends|Ashas Ree]].<ref name="TEA" /> Ch'hodos's deserts harbored native [[Species/Legends|lifeforms]].<ref name="Under a Red Star" />

==History==
An ambitious planet, Ch'hodos held the status of one of the lesser worlds of the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] and was under the control of Ziost, the Empire's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] world.<ref name="TEA" /> By [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]],<ref name="date5000">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]] to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]].</ref> Ch'hodos served as the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Shar Dakhan]]'s central base. During the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow's]] preparations to [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|attack]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Ch'hodos was used as a place to rally his [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] of the [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] caste.<ref name="TotJ" />

Overseen by Dakhan, Sadow's amassed [[Army/Legends|armies]] embarked aboard [[Sith dreadnaught|Sith personnel carriers]] that were waiting in front of a large stone building, while several [[Sith starfighter|starfighters]] and a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] flew overhead. Sadow himself and [[Gav Daragon]], his [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], also observed the gathering [[Troop/Legends|troops]] while discussing the upcoming attack.<ref name="TotJ" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
Circa [[3643 BBY]],<ref name="Date TOR">Per the reasoning [[Template:TOR_dates|here]], Act I of ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' takes place around [[3643 BBY]]. Since players of ''The Old Republic'' can assign their companions on the mission "Under a Red Star" independently of the main class storyline at any point during the game, the mission must take place at some point around 3643 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]].</ref> the [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] from Ch'hodos's [[Star/Legends|sun]] had increased, causing [[Mutant|mutations]] in the local desert wildlife. An individual visited Ch'hodos at that [[Time/Legends|time]] to observe the changes in the planet's lifeforms. Inside a cave, the visitor discovered [[Skeleton/Legends|skeletons]] of mutated creatures, which suggested that the planet's sun had cyclically gone through similar changes in radiation output in the past. The individual visiting Ch'hodos then obtained many comparative samples and brought them back to a partner.<ref name="Under a Red Star" />
{{Endgame}}

==Locations==
A large building had been made out of yellow stone in a rocky region of Ch'hodos.<ref name="TotJ" /> There was also a cave on the planet with skeletal remains of creatures inside it.<ref name="Under a Red Star" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ch'hodos made its first appearance in the [[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 2|second issue]] of [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire|''The Fall of the Sith Empire'']] story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] series of [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]].<ref name="TotJ" /> The issue was published on [[July 23]], [[1997]], and was written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and penciled by [[Dario Carrasco, Jr.]]<ref name="DH">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/95-294/Star-Wars-Tales-of-the-Jedi---The-Fall-of-the-Sith-Empire-2-of-5|text=Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi—The Fall of the Sith Empire #2 (of 5)}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the planet in grid square R-4.<ref name="TEA" /> Ch'hodos was subsequently mentioned in a Bioanalysis Crew Skill mission of the [[2011]] [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', though the information regarding the mission's outcome was later removed from the game.<ref name="Under a Red Star" />
